case_title: HERBERT ETIM VS. LUXOR CABS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-24-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-13-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ETIM, HERBERT AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC. CLAUDE, LEO SIMON DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-02-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-02-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-10-2017
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2017 CONTINUED TO SEP-13-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100022118)EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-24-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
